- web-landing-page and viewer-shell-assets together form a static presentation tier with zero inter-zone coupling — a clean architectural boundary separating presentational assets from application logic.
- landing.ts has zero detected imports but is classified as an entrypoint — if it references DOM APIs or global state shared with the main application bundle, that coupling would be invisible to the static import graph and could cause runtime conflicts undetectable by zone analysis
